Meal Buddy
Drag a recipe card onto the calendar to plan a meal. Your grocery list updates automatically.

Recipes

Your recipe library — build it manually or paste one in to import.

Meal Calendar

Plan breakfast, lunch, and dinner for the week.

Grocery List

Auto-generated from this week's planned meals.

Pantry

Items you already have — they'll be flagged on your grocery list.

New Recipe

Fill in the details below.

Import Recipe

Paste a link to a recipe page. Meal Buddy will try to fetch it and read its embedded recipe data (works on most recipe blogs and sites like AllRecipes, NYT Cooking, etc.). If a site can't be fetched, switch to "Paste Text" instead.
Paste a recipe's title, ingredient list, and instructions (copied from any site or note). Meal Buddy will parse quantities, units, and ingredient names automatically. You can fix anything afterward.

Bulk Import Recipes

Paste one recipe link per line. Meal Buddy fetches and parses each one in turn (this can take a little while for a long list). Sites that block fetching will show as failed — import those individually with "Paste Text" instead.
Paste multiple recipes in one go, or upload a .txt file. Separate each recipe with a line containing just ---. The first line of each recipe is used as its name; ingredient lines (starting with a quantity) and instruction lines are detected automatically, same as single-recipe import.

Choose a Recipe

Which supermarket do you shop at?

Used to estimate grocery prices and ingredient availability. You can change this anytime from the Grocery List tab.
